meter names. Use a MeterFilter bean to reliably enable histogram buckets
for http.server.requests.

fix(task-375): EODHD品种映射修复 — ETH/SOL/XRP Feature API 404根治

[F1] real_feature_api.py SYMBOL_MAP: ETHUSD/SOLUSD/XRPUSD→{ETH,SOL,XRP}-USD.CC (.s+无后缀共6条)
[F2] async→sync端点: /features/latest+/features/historical 防event loop阻塞(Tri-Brain Critical)
[F3] URL encode: urllib.parse.quote(eodhd_sym, safe="") 防路径注入(Tri-Brain Warning)
[F4] get_redis(): threading.Lock双重检查锁防并发竞态(Tri-Brain Warning)
[F5] HTTPException信息脱敏: 不向客户端暴露内部异常(Tri-Brain Warning)
验证: ETHUSD.s→200(atr_14=128.55)+SOLUSD.s→200(atr_14=5.87)+XRPUSD.s→200(atr_14=0.079)
测试: 44/44 PASS(+11新增T1~T11 ETH/SOL/XRP映射+URL断言); audit_pass; CC:v16.17.0

commit.message:
Revamp CLI output with lipgloss-powered UI (#22)

* Revamp CLI output with lipgloss-powered UI

Create internal/ui package with spinner, progress bar, styled helpers,
and lipgloss table rendering. Refactor all commands to use consistent
styled output: spinners for async operations, checkmarks for success,
styled errors that don't duplicate messages.

- Add charmbracelet/lipgloss dependency for terminal styling
- Create internal/ui with spinner, progress bar, table, and style helpers
- Colors match install.sh (purple accent, green success, red errors)
- Refactor pv install/update with 8 clean spinner steps + progress bar
- Add --verbose flag to install and update commands
- Suppress child process output by default (binaries, phpenv, setup)
- Acquire sudo credentials upfront to avoid password prompt during spinners
- Prettify all commands: status, list, link, unlink, start, stop, restart,
  service, use, php install/list/remove
- Use lipgloss table with rounded borders for site listings
- Add ErrAlreadyPrinted sentinel to prevent duplicate error messages
- Set SilenceErrors on rootCmd so cobra never prints raw errors
- Add footer with elapsed time for install/update

* fix(e2e): update tests for lipgloss UI output changes

The UI revamp moved all CLI output to os.Stderr for lipgloss styling.
E2e scripts were capturing stdout only; add 2>&1 to capture stderr too.
Also update assertions to match the new output format.

Co-authored-by: Clovis <munezaclovis@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* revert: use "(default)" instead of "(global)" for PHP version label

Reverts the "(global)" label back to "(default)" in both the Go source
(php_list.go, status.go) and the e2e test scripts.

Co-authored-by: Clovis <munezaclovis@users.noreply.github.com>

* Treat pv php install on existing version as no-op success

Installing an already-installed PHP version now succeeds (exit 0) with
a friendly checkmark message, like mkdir -p on an existing directory.
Update e2e test to match.

---------

Co-authored-by: claude[bot] <41898282+claude[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Clovis <munezaclovis@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Disable ISO download button until new ISO with the fix is built and tested.

commit.message:
fix(ci): venv jetable /tmp pour les tests — résout 'No such file .venv/bin/pytest'

Le runner self-hosted s'exécute en tant que jay4pro dans un workspace temporaire,
pas dans /home/cyberhealth/app/. Le .venv de prod n'est donc pas accessible.

Solution : créer un venv isolé dans /tmp à chaque run CI, installer requirements.txt,
lancer pytest, puis supprimer le venv pour ne pas polluer le serveur.

commit.message:
Add Elite Revenue tax delinquent lookup connector and Lehigh upset sale connector

Adds two new connectors for the PA tax delinquency pipeline:

- Elite Revenue Tax Delinquent Lookup: Real-time delinquent tax data for
  all Lehigh County parcels via eliterevenue.rba.com. Supports both
  parcel-based and address-based lookups with HTML parsing. Creates
  tax_delinquent signals with dollar amounts and year breakdowns.

- Lehigh County Upset Sale: Annual upset tax sale listings from Lehigh
  County Tax Claim Bureau. Parses sale schedules with parcel numbers,
  owners, and minimum bids.

Includes lookup engine, coverage registry entries, enrichment dispatch,
and parcel format validation (Elite Revenue format vs sheriff sale format).

commit.message:
fix(hooks): use absolute paths instead of $HOME for Windows compatibility

$HOME is not reliably resolved across all Windows shells (cmd.exe,
PowerShell, Git Bash). Since install.bat runs per-PC, absolute paths
are more reliable than portable $HOME-based paths.

security: 스크립트 하드코딩 토큰 제거 → 환경변수 방식으로 전환

- scripts/*.py 3개 파일에서 NOCODB_TOKEN 하드코딩 제거
  → os.environ.get("NOCODB_TOKEN") 으로 변경 (없으면 즉시 종료)
- .gitignore에 .env/.env.* 패턴 추가 (*.local 외 추가 보호)
- .env.example 생성 (신규 환경 셋업 가이드)
- .env.local에 NOCODB_TOKEN 항목 추가 (gitignore 적용됨, 커밋 안됨)

앞으로 모든 시크릿은 .env.local에서만 관리,
코드에 직접 기재 불가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use TRIGGER_ACCESS_TOKEN for trigger.dev v4 auth (#65)

v4 requires a Personal Access Token via TRIGGER_ACCESS_TOKEN,
not the v3 project secret key (TRIGGER_SECRET_KEY).

commit.message:
fix(orchestrator): storyRender step must break not return to set status=processing

return; bypassed the step status update entirely, leaving it as pending.
finalize's updateStepStatusOnlyIfProcessing then found pending and silently skipped.
Fix: break + include storyRender in isWorkerHandled so step gets set to PROCESSING.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix all svelte-check warnings: use untrack() for intentional initial-value snapshots

BookForm, HomeEditor, and YearPicker all initialize local $state from props
intentionally (edit forms, draft editors). Use untrack() to make the intent
explicit and silence state_referenced_locally warnings.

commit.message:
Remove broken build.yml workflow

Remove obsolete build.yml workflow that has hardcoded
'InferFlux' paths causing CI failures. The comprehensive
ci.yml workflow already handles all build and test jobs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): fix YAML parse error in auto-rebase workflow

The multi-line --body string in gh pr comment had lines at column 0
inside a run: | block whose base indentation is 10 spaces. YAML
terminated the literal block early and tried to parse those lines
as mapping keys, causing a parse error on every run (0 jobs).

Fix: collapse body to a single-line $'...\n...' ANSI-C string.

commit.message:
fix(story-processor): match processor.ts for captions, audio ducking, no vibration

- Captions: JSON → ASS via AssGenerator + subtitles filter (same as processor.ts)
- Music: sidechain ducking with sidechaincompress (same as processor.ts)
- No vibration: removed sin/cos camera_shake, all motions use stable Ken Burns effects
- Watermark: matches processor.ts escaping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Serve app at /__app__ via SW instead of blob URL

Blob URL iframes are not controlled by service workers, so the SW
could not intercept their data and image fetches. This broke loading
after the injected fetch interceptor was removed.

Fix: the SW now serves the processed app HTML at /__app__ (a real
HTTPS URL within its scope). The iframe src changes from a blob URL
to /__app__, making the iframe same-origin with the SW. All resource
loads from the iframe — data fetches, images, CSS backgrounds — are
now intercepted and proxied to the GitHub API.

The injected runtime script and proxyScripts.ts are removed; they
were only needed to work around blob URL limitations.

fix: add Permissions-Policy header for accelerometer/gyroscope

Permissions-Policy header. This worked on localhost because browsers
relax sensor restrictions for local development.
